---
title: 'PSTAT 174: Final Project'
subtitle: "Prof. Tomoyuki Ichiba"
author: "Aarti Garaye"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{tikz}
  - \usepackage{amsmath}
  - \usepackage{amsthm}
  - \usepackage{bbm}
  - \usepackage{float}
  - \usepackage{xcolor}
  - \DeclareMathOperator{\sign}{sign}
  - \DeclareMathOperator{\Cov}{Cov}
  - \DeclareMathOperator{\Var}{Var}
  - \newcommand{\indep}{\perp\!\!\!\perp}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Loading the Dataset
```{r data}
library(readr)

vix_data <- read.csv("VIXCLS.csv")

# Time Range: Jan 2, 1990 to Feb 16, 2026


# Non negative?
which(vix_data$VIXCLS < 0)

nrow(vix_data)
```


[link](https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/VIXCLS)
